name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans up to $1,000, and title loans up to $25,000 with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender operating physical storefronts and online platforms to serve consumers needing quick cash. The company has been established as a trusted provider for millions of people facing short-term financial needs, with significant scale indicated by their multiple store locations across the country. Their Jacksonville, FL location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave. is representative of their service model, operating extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday) with bilingual staff. The company maintains a 4.9 out of 5 star rating based on 125,419 reviews, suggesting consistent customer satisfaction with their service delivery.

Advance America offers three primary loan products. Payday loans range from $100-$500 and are designed as two to four-week short-term borrowing solutions. Installment loans provide up to $1,000 with multiple payment options over longer terms than payday loans. Title loans, offered in partnership with LoanCenter, extend up to $25,000 for applicants with paid-off vehicles, using the car's appraised value as collateral. All products are accessible both online and in-store, with same-day personal loans advertised up to $1,000. The company also offers Western Union services at their physical locations.

Advance America distinguishes itself through operational accessibility: extended weekend hours, bilingual customer service, and staff trained to explain loan options and the application process. Their high review volume and ratings suggest strong execution of customer service promises. The company provides online pre-qualification by phone and streamlined in-store applications with clear documentation requirements (government ID, proof of income, checking account, SSN/ITIN). Their partnership approach to title loans and integration of money services like Western Union adds convenience for their customer base.

However, consumers should recognize that Advance America operates in the high-cost small loan sector. While the website does not disclose APRs, payday and installment loans from such lenders typically carry significant interest rates and fees. The short repayment terms of payday loans (2-4 weeks) can create cycle risk for vulnerable borrowers. Title loans, while offering larger amounts, require vehicle collateral and risk repossession. This is fundamentally a subprime lender serving individuals with limited access to traditional credit, not a substitute for it. Prospective borrowers should carefully evaluate total cost of borrowing and explore lower-cost alternatives like credit union PALs or employer advances before committing.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for loans up to $1,000
Wide product range: payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans ($100-$1,000), title loans ($2,000-$25,000)
Extended store hours including Saturday mornings (9am-4pm) for working customers
Online and in-store application options with phone pre-qualification
4.9 out of 5 star rating from 125,419 verified customer reviews
No prepayment penalties implied; ability to pay installment loans in multiple payments over time
cons: APR and fee structure not disclosed on website, typical for payday lenders to charge 300%+ APR
Payday loans have very short 2-4 week terms, creating high risk of borrowing cycles
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating repossession risk if unpaid
Requires checking account and government ID, limiting access for unbanked/underbanked populations
Installment loans up to $1,000 may be insufficient for larger emergency expenses
best_for: Workers needing cash before next paycheck with reliable income for 2-4 week repayment
Vehicle owners with emergency expenses and strong repayment ability for title loans
Individuals without access to credit cards or bank loans seeking rapid funding
Spanish-speaking borrowers in Jacksonville seeking bilingual loan services
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed individuals with immediate cash needs who can repay within 2-4 weeks or have vehicle equity for larger loans. The critical caveat is that while their customer service is highly rated, payday and title loans carry substantial APRs and fees typical of subprime lending; consumers should exhaust lower-cost alternatives (credit union loans, employer advances, payment plans with creditors) before using these products, as the cost of borrowing can be significant and short terms create debt cycle risk.
services: Installment loans ($100-$1,000, multiple payments over time)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
